license_note: No third-party visual assets are redistributed. All rendered graphics, textures, particles, food illustrations, and motion fields are procedural HTML canvas or CSS created for this benchmark.

motion_only_ghost_jigsaw.transformation: Reimplemented from first principles as a live canvas puzzle with procedurally generated opposite-motion grayscale fields and shuffled draggable tiles.

cursor_constellation_hunt.transformation: Reimplemented from the paper description using new parametric shape templates, particle motion, decoy convergence basins, and procedural noise stars.

parallel_grillmaster.transformation: New CSS artwork and timing model with visual doneness cues and wider human-calibrated success windows. No source artwork or code copied.

rotating_keyboard.transformation: New click-only keyboard, five-character generator, 3D key-plane motion, and exact outcome verifier.

slot_reel_capture.inspiration: Neal Agarwal Not a Robot level 40
slot_reel_capture.transformation: New procedural five-reel implementation with independent periods, transient alphanumeric windows, ordered freezing, and a visible three-strike recovery system.
